name: Reports in accordance with Article 7(9) of Regulation (EU) 2026/73
businessDefinition: Does the financial undertaking report in accordance with Article 7(9) of Regulation (EU) 2026/73 by including in their management report the following statement: "No activities are claimed as being associated with economic activities that qualify as environmentally sustainable under Articles 3 and 9 of Regulation (EU) 2020/852 (Taxonomy Regulation)
